## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] Public/private functions have Google-style docstrings and type hints
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is a user-facing change
